name: @alpaca-open-api/core
description: TypeScript types, client, and endpoint catalog for the Alpaca Markets API, generated from the official OpenAPI specifications

scripts.generate: bunx openapi-typescript@7.13.0 https://docs.alpaca.markets/openapi/authx.yaml -o src/types/authx.ts && bunx openapi-typescript@7.13.0 https://docs.alpaca.markets/openapi/broker-api.json -o src/types/broker-api.ts && bunx openapi-typescript@7.13.0 https://docs.alpaca.markets/openapi/market-data-api.json -o src/types/market-data-api.ts && bunx openapi-typescript@7.13.0 https://docs.alpaca.markets/openapi/trading-api.json -o src/types/trading-api.ts

author: Yago
